name: -O
--output-document
options.description: Write documents to the specified file

name: -q
--quiet
options.description: Turn off output

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Turn on verbose output (default)

name: -c
--continue
options.description: Continue getting a partially downloaded file

name: -r
--recursive
options.description: Turn on recursive retrieving

options.name: --no-clobber
options.description: Do not overwrite existing files

options.name: --user-agent
options.description: Identify as the specified agent to the HTTP server

name: -P
--directory-prefix
options.description: Set directory prefix to specified value

name: -i
--input-file
options.description: Read URLs from a local or external file

name: -N
--timestamping
options.description: Only retrieve files newer than local copies

options.name: --no-check-certificate
options.description: Do not check the server certificate

name: -t
--tries
options.description: Set number of retries to the specified number

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Set all timeout values to the specified number of seconds

name: -l
--level
options.description: Specify recursion maximum depth level

options.name: --header
options.description: Send a custom HTTP header

options.name: --limit-rate
options.description: Limit the download speed to the specified rate

options.name: --mirror
options.description: Turn on options suitable for mirroring (shortcut for -N -r -l inf --no-remove-listing)

options.name: --no-parent
options.description: Do not ascend to the parent directory when retrieving recursively

options.name: --reject
options.description: Comma-separated list of file name suffixes or patterns to reject

options.name: --accept
options.description: Comma-separated list of file name suffixes or patterns to accept

name: -nv
--no-verbose
options.description: Turn off verbose without being completely quiet
